# Thread: Jack Lehman's Optimal Journal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jack-lehmans-optimal-journal.31892/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Ikkyuman — 2025-11-17T21:38:47+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jack-lehmans-optimal-journal.31892/post-362750>

Optimal Health Journal Nov 15, 2025

My name: Jack Lehman age 78
Born: Aug 23, 1947 in Jersey City, NJ
Both my parents were angerholics. My father was also an alcoholic and had PTSD from his 10 months of combat in Patton’s 4th Armored Division. He was abusive, using both his fists and his feet on me. From the beatings I learned that I’d rather be a hammer than a nail.

Got my bell wrung playing grammar school football - 1st concussion?
Started smoking cigarettes at age 8, stealing some from his pack. It was a way to say “fuck you” to my father.
Pleurisy at age 14.
High School football: broken metatarsal, broken index finger - 2nd concussion
Inspiration: I flunked Algebra and the principle took my report card and changed the F to D saving me from summer school. I was getting drunk, stealing, getting detention - I was angry and felt trapped. The Marist Brothers that ran the HS looked like they knew something that I didn’t. Started talking to them - signed up to go to Marist Prep in Cold Spring, NY as a junior. (Spent 7 years in the order, 4 with vows.) I thereby 1. escaped my father’s abuse and 2. I enjoyed hunting and fishing and playing ice hockey,

’69 - Went to Paris with $ from student loans.
’72 - Obtained a Maîtrise es Lettres (MA) in Philosophy at the Sorbonne in Paris. Wrote my
thesis on Nietzsche - a kindred soul and mentor.
’72 - Sailed from San Francisco to Yokohama on a Russian freighter. Spent 1 yr in Tokyo. Took
Sho Dan (black belt) in Karate. Taught English, French and Italian to survive.
’74 - Went overland from Italy to India on public buses - 6 months.
Lived in India for 7 yrs and 2 more in Japan.
’75 - Introduced to J Krishnamurti/ spent 21 days doing Vipassana in foothills of Himalayas.
Started getting free of what I call “The Dao Domination”
([https://www.buzzsprout.com/1554039/8691095](https://www.buzzsprout.com/1554039/8691095)), started being present.
Amoebic Dysentery, lot of it.
Met Rajneesh in Poona - 10 yrs living in his commune in India and then Oregon. Wild,
celebratory and informative years. Taught marshal arts, practiced tantra.
’78 - 3rd concussion - my teacher knocked me out - jaw broken in 2 places
’81 - Lived in the Oregon commune: drove heavy machinery without proper hearing protection
Tinnitus; aching joints. Bought my first horse. Still have horses - love to hunt elk with
them.
’84 - Moved to Santa Fe, NM - still here.
12 years of “Men’s Work”
MA in Counseling Psychology - Licensed Psychotherapist since ’96.
“Nonviolent Communication” - I learned from the founder, Marshall Rosenberg, the
nature of anger, it’s purpose and how to work with it so that it doesn’t eat your lunch.
I became a certified trainer in NVC in 2006 - still teaching it. IMO, it’s the best tool for
getting free of conditioning.

’86 - All mercury filings removed
’96 - First bout of Tansient Global Amnesia - onset experience just after working out at the
gymn - Cat scan at the ER.
2010 - Yellow fever vaccination that I could not find a way to avoid.
Aajonus Vonderplanitz - started eating raw eggs, raw meat, butter & cheese
2012 - Mohs surgery on right forehead for some kind of skin cancer
2014 - Neuroma in left foot from much dancing tango Buenos Aires in narrow shoes - still a
nuisance no.
2015 - 6 broken ribs when my horse and I went over backwards from a 20’ embankment. At
the bottom his ass was resting comfortably on my chest - airlifted out of the wilderness.
“Arthritis” in the base of both thumb.
Glenohumoral joint pain
Frequent straining of the muscles and tendons of right forearm
2016 - Hip replacement
Have eaten mostly elk, some deer, 1 bear and 1 oryx that I have killed in last 10-12
years.
2020 - Got covid mid February 2020 while visiting my daughter in Davis. CA. Spent 3 nights in
a motel and then flew back to Santa Fe. Took NO JAB. Stopped dancing t
though  hoping to avoid the shedding of spike protein.
2003 Arthritis now in base of right thumb too.
2024 - Spent 5 weeks in El Tunco - disappointed to not meet any JK members. Like the place.
Couldn’t catch any fish. I tried often from the shore in the early morning and
at sunset. Anybody know how to fish from the shore in ES?
Have a ticket to ES for Dec. 5
2025 - Tore my left achilles tendon (partial tear) while bucking up a hung up pine tree.
Surgery on Sept 15. In PT now. I have booked a flight to ES for Dec 5. I will see the
surgeon on 19th hoping to get the ok to travel.

Recap of Current Body Issues

Cataracts - Diagnosed about 2 years ago.
I gleaned from Jack’s writing on cataracts that the brain, by increasing opacity
of the lens is trying to protect itself from nnEMF, blue light and that the treatment
ls to limit exposure to the latter and to increase the amount and quality of sunlight.
So I consistently observe the sunrise and sun gaze every day. Take many breaks
every day to allow sunlight into my eyes. I wear blue blockers, never sunglasses
or sunscreen. I go to bed within an hour or so of sunset. I only have
Incandescent bulbs in my house. I do some (not as much) grounding daily
but do live on the 2nd floor of my barn. I have grounding mats but haven’t yet
sunk grounding rods in the dirt to ground them directly.
Floaters - More in LT eye than the Rt one. Rt eye dominant.

Connective Tissue pain - thumbs, trigger finger, Glenohumoral joints, right forearm
Neuroma - left foot

Numbness - right heel area - Lack of energy flowing to the numb area due to my titanium
hip?

Transient Global Amnesia - 1st episode was harsh because I thought that my brain was
permanently damaged. I knew my name but not much else. Short term
memory was totally gone. My fear was catastrophic. But the next day I
was normal. So during the consequent episodes I had little fear. I rode
them out. One, around 12 yrs ago was so severe that I couldn’t teach a
the workshop when I arrived at the venue.
My mother did die from a stroke so I would like to get Jack’s
counsel about my GTA. Anyone want to comment on this?
Torn achilles -healing up - is this accident related to a systemic weakness in a connective
Issue? If so what is causing it and how to mitigate it?
I have a ticket to ES for Dec. 5. I hope my surgeon will ok my date.
Would like to find a place not too far from the beach with low EMF etc.
Does anyone know how to go about finding it?

I don’t know my haplotype and am not sure how to find out. My father is about 90% Irish.
My mother is 100% Italian, Her people are from Caserta, just north of Naples.

Mother’s History

Born: Aug 16, 1920
Died: 2005 - stroke, few months after my father died.
Had 4 children and 1 miscarriage
Mitral Valve Prolapse diagnosis - Took Coumadin - misdiagnosis? Took Coumadin.
Varicose veins
Osteoarthritis in knees
Migraines
Diverticulitis
Removal of skin cancer on nose

Maternal Grandmother 100% Italian

Born 1901 Died 1984? From heart problems Had 5 children.
Severe osteoarthritis
Bad migraines
Triple Bipass Surgery
Died from some heart condition methinks.

# Thread: Newbie from the north
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/newbie-from-the-north.31899/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Carol.Z — 2025-11-18T19:53:17+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/newbie-from-the-north.31899/post-362810>

Hi all! A little background:
i grew up loving physical activity and sports. We had a pool growing up and I worshipped the sun, but being a redhead, I started using sunscreen in my teens. Vision wise I’ve been wearing glasses or contacts since third grade. I worked as a RN for 35 years. I chose to do night shift for years, and did not value sleep when our kids were young. In 2014 I was diagnosed with an autoimmune connective tissue disorder that flares up now and then. In 2020 I was required to take the jab to keep my job (something I’ll never forgive myself for). In Feb 2021 I was diagnosed with stageIV ALK Positive lung cancer with loss of tp53. I have never smoked. I retired in 2022 and my cancer is stable on targeted therapy. Our son has been battling anxiety and depression for years. We have been working with a functional medicine provider and he has seen some improvement. He has been a “night shift” guy as well, but since finding Uncle Jack we are excited and motivated for change and a healthier future. I just ordered his epi-paleo rx, and we are implemending all things sun related - albeit in Michigan.
I am beyond excited to soak in all things “Jack Kruse” related to get my family healthy without pills and prescriptions.
Thank God I’ve found you, Uncle Jack!

# Thread: Ariel School UFO/UAP Incident - Warning of Technology
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ariel-school-ufo-uap-incident-warning-of-technology.31901/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### MTA321 — 2025-11-18T22:59:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ariel-school-ufo-uap-incident-warning-of-technology.31901/post-362815>

If any of you are familiar with UFO/UAP history there is a famous incident that occurred in Ruwa, Zimbabwe in 1994. The gist of the encounter is approximately 62 children reported seeing one or more shiny, silver, disc-shaped objects descend from the sky and land in a brushy, wooded area just beyond the playground fence. About a dozen children reported receiving a strong telepathic communication from the beings. These messages involved:

-   Humanity is destroying the Earth through pollution and technology.
-   If we don't change our ways, "there will be no more Earth" or "people will die"
-   A few said the beings seemed sad or concerned rather than threatening.

The connection with these "warnings of technology" destroying our planet really resonated after reading many of the blogs/posts that Jack writes. Just thought it was an interesting connection in regards to how nnEMF is destroying us today. Unfortunately their attempt (like many others) fell on deaf ears.

### Tjmorki6 — 2025-11-19T01:58:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ariel-school-ufo-uap-incident-warning-of-technology.31901/post-362819>

I heard they met Eisenhower too to tell him the same thing.

### Chlo_e — 2025-11-19T12:47:47+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ariel-school-ufo-uap-incident-warning-of-technology.31901/post-362836>

> [Tjmorki6 said:](/goto/post?id=362819)
>
> I heard they met Eisenhower too to tell him the same thing.

His great granddaughter has given interviews relating to this topic (Laura Eisenhower if I remember correctly). Offers a very different perspective than the average person's understanding of reality.

It also interested me to learn that the CIA was officially formed the same year as the Roswell incident, just a couple of months after the debris was apparently found.

### MTA321 — 2025-11-19T17:17:11+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ariel-school-ufo-uap-incident-warning-of-technology.31901/post-362851>

> [Chlo\_e said:](/goto/post?id=362836)
>
> His great granddaughter has given interviews relating to this topic (Laura Eisenhower if I remember correctly). Offers a very different perspective than the average person's understanding of reality.
>
> It also interested me to learn that the CIA was officially formed the same year as the Roswell incident, just a couple of months after the debris was apparently found.

The Magenta, Italy crash in 1933 was allegedly given to the US by Pope Pius XII around the same time the National Security Act was established. Not only this, before Harald Malmgren died, he reportedly tied in Dulles and Angleton's involvement with the knights of Malta which could have involved the transfer of crashed materials. They used the Atomic energy act as a catchall classification for all UFO/UAP incidents. So anything emitting specific radiation or any data that can be used in the creation of atomic weapons were classified. Wild stuff.

If you go deep down the rabbit hole all of the evidence points to some type of non-human intelligence exposure in my opinion. The extent is the tricky part to nail down. Granted a lot of what we have heard is pure disinformation shrouded in nuggets of truth.

My guess is Groves had his sticky fingers in the mix during all of this as well.

The more you dig into the phenomenon, the weirder it gets. At a certain point it shifts from nuts and bolts technology to more metaphysical.

# Thread: Hi from the Gambia, Urko :)
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hi-from-the-gambia-urko.31903/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### urko — 2025-11-19T12:02:33+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hi-from-the-gambia-urko.31903/post-362835>

Hello everybody!
My woman Ro and me, Urko, came to the Gambia July 26th 2025 after a several discussion in November 2023 when we read the Invisible Rainbow book and started following dr Jack Kruse. We were living in 43rd latitude in the north of Spain inside the deeper basque country. We enjoyed a really nice journey in a place full of nature and cold but really lack of sun, too much clouds and a lot of issues with the local police officer that were a pain in the ass for all the people living there.

Some of the arguments that took us here were:
\- UV the whole year
\- Balanced light and dark cycles (here around 12-12h)
\- Less technologically developed place in terms of artificial light and EMF (still there are many antennas here but we deal with less populated areas than EU)
\- Do need to wear much clothes
\- Can be barefooted 100% of the time
\- Close to the sea
\- Good fish + food
\- Run away from the surveillance EU regulations and digital ID thing
\- Still in similar TZ as EU to work with my regular customers and do not loose the remote jobs I have

I'm really pleased to be on this forum I've just purchased the gold membership and I hope I can start using it but don't have enough time yet as we are on the way looking to purchase a land where we set up, we are still living in a tent I have posted many videos of our journey in our [private selfhosted peertube instance](https://tv.atalayacomunidad.org/w/p/hwUNZpnNezSb5Fqe742EFN)

I would like to know other members here in west Africa to be able to join or if somebody is planning to travel we can arrange a meeting and help with anything we can do.

### ryantiefen — 2025-11-22T21:32:19+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hi-from-the-gambia-urko.31903/post-362993>

Hello Urko! Sounds like an epic journey you have undergone. How can I see your videos? Do you have a link?

### urko — 2025-11-22T21:55:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hi-from-the-gambia-urko.31903/post-362995>

> Hello Urko! Sounds like an epic journey you have undergone. How can I see your videos? Do you have a link?

There is an hyperlink on the post if you mouse over \`selfhosted peertube instance\` you will see the link
Updates in regards to this, we are thinking about moving to South America in regards to some issues we found here to small villages playing loud music with speakers every week and random days sometimes while day until late night. So living in a tent with 0 wall protection/isolation is hard and we really think this is a common pattern in Africa.

So we liked this place but the prices in the coast per hectare are even more expensive than remote places in Spain, but because it is coastal area they are pretty expensive, we were looking a land and we found 7000 square m for 1Million GMD (do the maths) and pretty bad access to reach in rainy season.

So very disjointed with that as some guy we met from Spain promised as very cheap prices.

The adventure and the experience are priceless by the way and we are so happy to left the EU but now we are looking to Colombia or Paraguay we don't know whether we could find a gap in El Salvador, I work as Software engineer and can work remotely but very stupid of mine that didn't save many money these past years due to lifestyle decision (bad past life with drugs and night life turned to more spiritual after 2019 Ayahuasca events to end 2023 discovery of Dr Jack Kruse)

So anyways I"m now targeting South American countries as we speak Spanish and we won't have any issue with that but we are open to anything
I hope more people can read this, we plan to move in June 2026 I would like to receive some feedback from others relocated to those areas.
We were living in the deepest basque country since 2020 running away from crazy plandemics and EMF, we found a place with no internet connection, no dial connection only satellite and very pure winter with snow but full of clouds every time... So I have experience with rural work with garden and animals that's basically what we want, couple hectares for some cows, goats and chickens to self sustain ourselves pure organically like some close friends are doing in Spain making the best butter, some Spanish members may know Jorge and Zeltia hehe

Well I'm looking for something to rent so I can later find a place to purchase and start building step by step without any pressure. Our goal is to build organically as well without the usage of cement at least for the house to sleep.

I also have a 4x4 car, a trailer and many things I would like to send by container as I don't want to sell it at very low price and make loss of of it.
Small issue is the timezone difference with my customers in Sweden and Switzerland but the Swiss client won't be any issue, there are not many meetings per month, but the Swedish I could probably loose the job but I have to ask them, but anyway whether I loose or not I believe I could find any other possibility

I want to have our own animals for self sustainability but keeping the job I have still for a while as it gives me a good opportunity to make good funds in any place of the world and continue buying bitcoin

I found the issue with the EU and the first sector (farming and agriculture) which is funded by EU at a cost of slavery. People are paid by hectare and per animal they have but every year they use to add more restrictions. Some are like you are required to vaccinate animals to send the animals to the slaughterhouse (people use to kill at home) and the market manipulation that make costs very high compare to the income so the profit is very low for the work you have to do. And it is a wheel, it never ends once you enter into the funding circle.

Some friends I know have a few cows (4) and some sheep (100) and they created a good private community and doing very good job, but to me I don't see myself working on this to produce for other people, at least now, we just want some self sustainability like we had with the chickens and the goats in basque country but adding cows now

> Hello everybody!
> My woman Ro and me, Urko, came to the Gambia July 26th 2025 after a several discussion in November 2023 when we read the Invisible Rainbow book and started following dr Jack Kruse. We were living in 43rd latitude in the north of Spain inside the deeper basque country. We enjoyed a really nice journey in a place full of nature and cold but really lack of sun, too much clouds and a lot of issues with the local police officer that were a pain in the ass for all the people living there.
>
> Some of the arguments that took us here were:
> \- UV the whole year
> \- Balanced light and dark cycles (here around 12-12h)
> \- Less technologically developed place in terms of artificial light and EMF (still there are many antennas here but we deal with less populated areas than EU)
> \- Do need to wear much clothes
> \- Can be barefooted 100% of the time
> \- Close to the sea
> \- Good fish + food
> \- Run away from the surveillance EU regulations and digital ID thing
> \- Still in similar TZ as EU to work with my regular customers and do not loose the remote jobs I have
>
> I'm really pleased to be on this forum I've just purchased the gold membership and I hope I can start using it but don't have enough time yet as we are on the way looking to purchase a land where we set up, we are still living in a tent I have posted many videos of our journey in our [private selfhosted peertube instance](https://tv.atalayacomunidad.org/w/p/hwUNZpnNezSb5Fqe742EFN)
